description: Wire the existing AuditLog from core/src/observability.rs into the IronCore struct so that security-critical operations emit tamper-evident audit events. This is Task A of the Audit Logging Sprint — completing P0 gap #6 (no audit logging). The AuditLog, AuditEvent, AuditEventType, and AuditLogError types already exist in core/src/observability.rs with full test coverage. This task ONLY adds the IronCore integration wiring — do NOT modify observability.rs itself. CHANGES REQUIRED IN core/src/lib.rs: (1) Add 'audit_log: Arc<RwLock<observability::AuditLog>>' field to the IronCore struct, placed after the 'relay_registry' field. (2) Initialize the audit_log in IronCore::init() (both native and WASM paths) with 'observability::AuditLog::new()'. (3) Initialize the audit_log in IronCore::init_async() (WASM path) with 'observability::AuditLog::new()'. (4) Emit audit events at these security-critical operations — add the audit event emission AFTER the operation succeeds (not on error): (a) initialize_identity() — emit AuditEventType::IdentityCreated with identity_id from self.identity.read().identity_id() (b) prepare_message_with_id() — emit AuditEventType::MessageSent with identity_id and peer_id=Some(recipient_key_trimmed) (c) receive_message() — emit AuditEventType::MessageReceived with identity_id and peer_id=Some(sender_identity_id) BUT only for non-receipt, non-blocked Text messages (d) block_peer() / block_and_delete_peer() — emit AuditEventType::ContactBlocked with identity_id and peer_id=Some(peer_id) (e) unblock_peer() — emit AuditEventType::ContactRemoved with identity_id and peer_id=Some(peer_id) (f) export_identity_backup() — emit AuditEventType::BackupExported with identity_id (g) import_identity_backup() — emit AuditEventType::BackupImported with identity_id (5) IMPORTANT: All audit event emissions must be fire-and-forget (let _ = ...) — they MUST NOT change the return value or error behavior of the original method. If the audit_log lock fails, log a tracing::warn but do not propagate the error. (6) IMPORTANT: For WASM compatibility, the audit_log field must NOT be cfg-gated — it must be present in both native and WASM builds. (7) Add 'use observability::{AuditEventType, AuditLog};' at the top of lib.rs with the other use statements. (8) Do NOT add any new Cargo dependencies. (9) Do NOT modify core/src/observability.rs. (10) Do NOT modify api.udl or mobile_bridge.rs — that is Task C. (11) After making changes, ensure 'use observability::AuditEventType;' and 'use observability::AuditLog;' are imported correctly for the code to compile. The existing 'pub mod observability;' in lib.rs already exports the module. (12) The identity_id for audit events should come from self.identity.read().identity_id().unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string()). (13) Save all changes to core/src/lib.rs.
expected_output: Modified core/src/lib.rs with: (1) audit_log field on IronCore struct, (2) initialization in both init paths, (3) audit event emissions at all 7 security-critical operations listed above. Code must compile cleanly with 'cargo check --workspace --lib' and pass 'cargo test --workspace --lib'.
